title: Island Basics
description: Lightweight unofficial modpack to quickstart your MCC Island journey
body:
## 🌿 Island Basics

**Island Basics** is a lightweight, bare bones, no-bull**** modpack made to quickstart your MCC Island journey. It comes included with the essential optimisation mods and community-made QoL upgrades for MCCI:
- [Trident](https://modrinth.com/mod/trident-mcci)
- [Jamboree](https://modrinth.com/mod/jamboree)
- [Radar](https://modrinth.com/mod/radar)


> Not affiliated/endorsed by Noxcrew or Mojang
